case.title: STANDARD OIL CO. OF CALIFORNIA v. CITY OF LOS ANGELES

opinion.h1: STANDARD OIL CO. OF CALIFORNIA v. CITY OF LOS ANGELES, 393 U.S. 267 (1968)
opinion.h4: STANDARD OIL CO. OF CALIFORNIA v. CITY OF LOS ANGELES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 609. Decided December 16, 1968.
opinion.p: 262 Cal. App. 2d 118, 68 Cal. Rptr. 512, appeal dismissed.
Francis R. Kirkham, Francis N. Marshall, and Marcus Mattson for appellant.
Roger Arnebergh, Gilmore Tillman, Henry E. Kappler, and Ellis J. Horvitz for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.'
